if.if:
AND (
B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
B.CSTMR_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
B.CSTMR_TEL_RN LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
B.CSTMR_ADDR LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
B.CSTMR_MAIL LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
A.RES_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
)

mapper.select:
SELECT T2.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, T1.* FROM ( SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY , A.MANAGER_CODE , A.AGENT_CODE , A.SERVICE_TYPE , A.OPER_TYPE , A.CSTMR_TYPE , A.RES_CODE , A.RES_MSG , A.RES_NO , A.CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG , A.CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG , A.CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG , A.CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG , A.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG , A.CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG , A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , A.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO , A.PSTATE , A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE , A.OPEN_NO , A.FILE01 , A.FILE01_MASK , A.FAXYN , A.FAXNUM , A.SCAN_ID , A.ON_OFF_TYPE , A.RIP , A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER , A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER2 , A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER3 , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE , A.REQ_MODEL_NAME , A.REQ_MODEL_COLOR , A.REQ_PHONE_SN , A.REQ_USIM_SN , A.REQ_PAY_TYPE , A.REQ_ADDITION , A.SHOP_CD , A.APP_FORM_YN , A.REQ_IN_DAY , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.ETC_SPECIAL , A.REQ_USIM_NAME , A.PHONE_PAYMENT , A.REQ_ADDITION_PRICE , A.APP_FORM_XML_YN , TO_CHAR(A.OPEN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD : HH24:MI:SS') AS OPEN_REQ_DATE , TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD : HH24:MI:SS') AS RDATE , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE , B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME , B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN , B.CSTMR_TEL_MN , B.CSTMR_TEL_RN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || '-' || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || '-' || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN AS CSTMR_MOBILE , B.CSTMR_POST , B.CSTMR_ADDR , B.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL , B.CSTMR_ADDR_BJD , B.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE , B.CSTMR_MAIL , B.CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG , B.CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE , B.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN , B.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM , B.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN , B.OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG , B.OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM , B.OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN , B.OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION , B.OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM , B.CSTMR_NAME , B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , C.MINOR_AGENT_NAME , C.MINOR_AGENT_RRN , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN , C.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION , C.JRDCL_AGENT_NAME , C.JRDCL_AGENT_RRN , C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN , C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN , C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN , C.ENTRUST_REQ_NM , C.ENTRUST_RES_NM , C.ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION , C.ENTRUST_RES_RRN , C.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN , C.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN , C.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN , D.MOVE_COMPANY , D.MOVE_MOBILE_FN , D.MOVE_MOBILE_MN , D.MOVE_MOBILE_RN , D.MOVE_AUTH_TYPE , D.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER , D.MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE , D.MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT , D.MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG , D.REQ_GUIDE_FLAG , D.REQ_GUIDE_FN , D.REQ_GUIDE_RN , D.REQ_GUIDE_MN , E.REQ_AC_TYPE , E.REQ_AC01_BALANCE , E.REQ_AC02_DAY , E.REQ_AC01_AMOUNT , E.REQ_AC02_AMOUNT , F.MODEL_ID , F.MODEL_MONTHLY , F.MODEL_INSTALLMENT , F.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE , F.RECYCLE_YN , F.MODEL_DISCOUNT1 , F.MODEL_DISCOUNT2 , F.SOC_CODE /* , CASE WHEN (SELECT P.RATE_NAME FROM MCP_RATE@DL_MCP P WHERE P.ACT_FLAG = 'Y' AND (P.AGREEMENT = '0' OR P.AGREEMENT IS NULL) AND P.KT_RATE_CODE = F.SOC_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1) IS NULL THEN F.SOC_CODE ELSE (SELECT P.RATE_NAME FROM MCP_RATE@DL_MCP P WHERE P.ACT_FLAG = 'Y' AND (P.AGREEMENT = '0' OR P.AGREEMENT IS NULL) AND P.KT_RATE_CODE = F.SOC_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1) END RATE_NAME */ , ( SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST MRM WHERE MRM.RATE_CD = F.SOC_CODE ) AS RATE_NAME , F.USIM_PRICE_TYPE , F.JOIN_PRICE_TYPE , F.JOIN_PRICE , F.USIM_PRICE , F.MODEL_PRICE , F.ADDTION_SERVICE , F.ADDTION_SERVICE_SUM , F.ENGG_MNTH_CNT , F.MODEL_PRICE_VAT , G.NAME_CHANGE_NM , G.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN , G.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN , G.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN , G.NAME_CHANGE_RRN , G.NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT , H.DLVRY_NAME , H.DLVRY_TEL_FN , H.DLVRY_TEL_MN , H.DLVRY_TEL_RN , H.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN , H.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN , H.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN , H.DLVRY_POST , H.DLVRY_ADDR , H.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL , H.DLVRY_ADDR_BJD , H.DLVRY_MEMO , I.REQ_BANK , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER , I.REQ_CARD_NAME , I.REQ_CARD_RRN , I.REQ_CARD_COMPANY , I.REQ_CARD_NO , I.REQ_CARD_YY , I.REQ_CARD_MM , I.REQ_WIRE_TYPE , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID FROM MSP_REQUEST A , MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR B , MSP_REQUEST_AGENT C , MSP_REQUEST_MOVE D , MSP_REQUEST_PAYMENT E , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO F , MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE G --, MSP_REQUSET_DLVRY H , MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY H , MSP_REQUEST_REQ I WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND C.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND D.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY AND E.REQUEST_KEY = F.REQUEST_KEY AND F.REQUEST_KEY = G.REQUEST_KEY AND G.REQUEST_KEY = H.REQUEST_KEY AND H.REQUEST_KEY = I.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY < 10000
ORDER BY A.REQUEST_KEY DESC ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) T2 WHERE RN > #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_REQUEST A , MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR B , MSP_REQUEST_AGENT C , MSP_REQUEST_MOVE D , MSP_REQUEST_PAYMENT E , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO F , MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE G --, MSP_REQUSET_DLVRY H , MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY H , MSP_REQUEST_REQ I WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND C.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND D.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY AND E.REQUEST_KEY = F.REQUEST_KEY AND F.REQUEST_KEY = G.REQUEST_KEY AND G.REQUEST_KEY = H.REQUEST_KEY AND H.REQUEST_KEY = I.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY < 10000

SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY requestKey , A.SERVICE_TYPE serviceType , F.SOC_CODE rateCode /* , CASE WHEN (SELECT P.RATE_NAME FROM MCP_RATE@DL_MCP P WHERE P.ACT_FLAG = 'Y' AND (P.AGREEMENT = '0' OR P.AGREEMENT IS NULL) AND P.KT_RATE_CODE = F.SOC_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1) IS NULL THEN F.SOC_CODE ELSE (SELECT P.RATE_NAME FROM MCP_RATE@DL_MCP P WHERE P.ACT_FLAG = 'Y' AND (P.AGREEMENT = '0' OR P.AGREEMENT IS NULL) AND P.KT_RATE_CODE = F.SOC_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1) END rateName */ , ( SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST MRM WHERE MRM.RATE_CD = F.SOC_CODE ) AS rateName , A.OPER_TYPE operType , A.CSTMR_TYPE cstmrType , B.CSTMR_NAME cstmrName , B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN cstmrNativeRrn , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION cstmrForeignerNation , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN cstmrForeignerRrn , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN cstmrForeignerPn , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE cstmrForeignerSdate , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE cstmrForeignerEdate , B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME cstmrPrivateCname , B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER cstmrPrivateNumber , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME cstmrJuridicalCname , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN cstmrJuridicalRrn , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER cstmrJuridicalNumber , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN cstmrTelFn , B.CSTMR_TEL_MN cstmrTelMn , B.CSTMR_TEL_RN cstmrTelRn , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN || B.CSTMR_TEL_MN || B.CSTMR_TEL_RN AS cstmrTel , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN cstmrMobileFn , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN cstmrMobileMn , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN cstmrMobileRn , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || '-' || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || '-' || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN AS cstmrMobile , B.CSTMR_POST cstmrPost , B.CSTMR_ADDR cstmrAddr , B.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL cstmrAddrDtl , B.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE cstmrBillSendCode , B.CSTMR_MAIL cstmrMail , B.CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG cstmrMailReceiveFlag , A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER reqWantNumber , A.REQ_PAY_TYPE reqPayType , I.REQ_BANK reqBank , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME reqAccountName , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN reqAccountRrn , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION reqAccountRelation , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER reqAccountNumber , I.REQ_CARD_NAME reqCardName , I.REQ_CARD_RRN reqCardRrn , I.REQ_CARD_COMPANY reqCardCompany , I.REQ_CARD_NO reqCardNo , I.REQ_CARD_YY reqCardYy , I.REQ_CARD_MM reqCardMm , E.REQ_AC_TYPE reqAcType , E.REQ_AC01_BALANCE reqAc01Balance , E.REQ_AC01_AMOUNT reqAc01Amount , E.REQ_AC02_DAY reqAc02Day , E.REQ_AC02_AMOUNT reqAc02Amount , D.REQ_GUIDE_FLAG reqGuideFlag , D.REQ_GUIDE_FN reqGuideFn , D.REQ_GUIDE_MN reqGuideMn , D.REQ_GUIDE_RN reqGuideRn , D.REQ_GUIDE_FN || D.REQ_GUIDE_MN || D.REQ_GUIDE_RN AS reqGuide , I.REQ_WIRE_TYPE reqWireType , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE reqBuyType , A.REQ_MODEL_NAME reqModelName , A.REQ_ADDITION reqAddition , D.MOVE_COMPANY moveCompany , D.MOVE_MOBILE_FN moveMobileFn , D.MOVE_MOBILE_MN moveMobileMn , D.MOVE_MOBILE_RN moveMobileRn , D.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || D.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || D.MOVE_MOBILE_RN AS moveMobile , D.MOVE_AUTH_TYPE moveAuthType , D.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER moveAuthNumber , D.MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE moveThismonthPayType , D.MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT moveAllotmentStat , D.MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG moveRefundAgreeFlag , C.MINOR_AGENT_NAME minorAgentName , C.MINOR_AGENT_RRN minorAgentRrn , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN minorAgentTelFn , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN minorAgentTelMn , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN minorAgentTelRn , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN || C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN || C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN AS minorAgentTel , C.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION minorAgentRelation , C.JRDCL_AGENT_NAME jrdclAgentName , C.JRDCL_AGENT_RRN jrdclAgentRrn , C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN jrdclAgentTelFn , C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN jrdclAgentTelMn , C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN jrdclAgentTelRn , C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN || C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN || C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN AS jrdclAgentTel , H.DLVRY_NAME dlvryName , H.DLVRY_TEL_FN dlvryTelFn , H.DLVRY_TEL_MN dlvryTelMn , H.DLVRY_TEL_RN dlvryTelRn , H.DLVRY_TEL_FN || H.DLVRY_TEL_MN || H.DLVRY_TEL_RN AS dlvryTel , H.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN dlvryMobileFn , H.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN dlvryMobileMn , H.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN dlvryMobileRn , H.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN || H.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN || H.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN AS dlvryMobile , H.DLVRY_POST dlvryPost , H.DLVRY_ADDR dlvryAddr , H.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL dlvryAddrDtl , H.DLVRY_MEMO dlvryMemo , A.CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG clausePriCollectFlag , A.CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG clausePriOfferFlag , A.CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG clauseEssCollectFlag , A.CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG clausePriTrustFlag , A.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG clausePriAdFlag , A.CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG clauseConfidenceFlag , A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE onlineAuthType , A.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO onlineAuthInfo , A.RES_CODE resCode , A.RES_MSG resMsg , A.RES_NO resNo , A.PSTATE pstate , A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE requestStateCode , A.OPEN_NO openNo , A.RIP rip , TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD : HH24:MI:SS') rdate , A.AGENT_CODE agentCode , A.MANAGER_CODE managerCode , A.FILE01 file01 , A.FILE01_MASK file01Mask , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID cntpntShopId FROM MSP_REQUEST A , MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR B , MSP_REQUEST_AGENT C , MSP_REQUEST_MOVE D , MSP_REQUEST_PAYMENT E , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO F , MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE G --, MSP_REQUSET_DLVRY H , MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY H , MSP_REQUEST_REQ I WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND C.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND D.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY AND E.REQUEST_KEY = F.REQUEST_KEY AND F.REQUEST_KEY = G.REQUEST_KEY AND G.REQUEST_KEY = H.REQUEST_KEY AND H.REQUEST_KEY = I.REQUEST_KEY

SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY , CASE(A.SERVICE_TYPE) WHEN 'PP' THEN '선불' WHEN 'PO' THEN '후불' ELSE '' END AS SERVICE_TYPE , F.SOC_CODE RATE_CODE /* , CASE WHEN (SELECT P.RATE_NAME FROM MCP_RATE@DL_MCP P WHERE P.ACT_FLAG = 'Y' AND (P.AGREEMENT = '0' OR P.AGREEMENT IS NULL) AND P.KT_RATE_CODE = F.SOC_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1) IS NULL THEN F.SOC_CODE ELSE (SELECT P.RATE_NAME FROM MCP_RATE@DL_MCP P WHERE P.ACT_FLAG = 'Y' AND (P.AGREEMENT = '0' OR P.AGREEMENT IS NULL) AND P.KT_RATE_CODE = F.SOC_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1) END RATE_NAME */ , ( SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST MRM WHERE MRM.RATE_CD = F.SOC_CODE ) AS RATE_NAME , CASE(A.OPER_TYPE) WHEN 'HCN3' THEN '기기변경' WHEN 'HDN3' THEN '보상기변3G' WHEN 'MNP3' THEN '번호이동' WHEN 'NAC3' THEN '신규가입' ELSE '' END AS OPER_TYPE , CASE(A.CSTMR_TYPE) WHEN 'NA' THEN '내국인' WHEN 'NM' THEN '내국인(미성년자)' WHEN 'FN' THEN '외국인' WHEN 'JP' THEN '법인사업자' WHEN 'PP' THEN '개인사업자' ELSE '' END AS CSTMR_TYPE , B.CSTMR_NAME , B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE , B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME , B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN , B.CSTMR_TEL_MN , B.CSTMR_TEL_RN , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN || B.CSTMR_TEL_MN || B.CSTMR_TEL_RN AS CSTMR_TEL , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN AS CSTMR_MOBILE , CASE(B.CSTMR_POST) WHEN '' THEN '' ELSE SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_POST, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_POST, 4, 3) END AS CSTMR_POST , B.CSTMR_ADDR , B.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL , CASE(B.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE) WHEN 'LX' THEN '우편발송' WHEN 'CB' THEN '이메일방송' ELSE '' END AS CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE , B.CSTMR_MAIL , B.CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG , A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER , A.REQ_PAY_TYPE , I.REQ_BANK , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION , I.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER , I.REQ_CARD_NAME , I.REQ_CARD_RRN , I.REQ_CARD_COMPANY , I.REQ_CARD_NO , I.REQ_CARD_YY , I.REQ_CARD_MM , E.REQ_AC_TYPE , E.REQ_AC01_BALANCE , E.REQ_AC01_AMOUNT , E.REQ_AC02_DAY , E.REQ_AC02_AMOUNT , D.REQ_GUIDE_FLAG , D.REQ_GUIDE_FN , D.REQ_GUIDE_MN , D.REQ_GUIDE_RN , D.REQ_GUIDE_FN || D.REQ_GUIDE_MN || D.REQ_GUIDE_RN AS REQ_GUIDE , I.REQ_WIRE_TYPE , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE , A.REQ_MODEL_NAME , A.REQ_ADDITION , D.MOVE_COMPANY , D.MOVE_MOBILE_FN , D.MOVE_MOBILE_MN , D.MOVE_MOBILE_RN , D.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || D.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || D.MOVE_MOBILE_RN AS MOVE_MOBILE , D.MOVE_AUTH_TYPE , D.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER , D.MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE , D.MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT , D.MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG , C.MINOR_AGENT_NAME , C.MINOR_AGENT_RRN , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN || C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN || C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN AS MINOR_AGENT_TEL , C.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION , C.JRDCL_AGENT_NAME , C.JRDCL_AGENT_RRN , C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN , C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN , C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN , C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN || C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN || C.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN AS JRDCL_AGENT_TEL , H.DLVRY_NAME , H.DLVRY_TEL_FN , H.DLVRY_TEL_MN , H.DLVRY_TEL_RN , H.DLVRY_TEL_FN || H.DLVRY_TEL_MN || H.DLVRY_TEL_RN AS DLVRY_TEL , H.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN , H.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN , H.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN , H.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN || H.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN || H.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN AS DLVRY_MOBILE , CASE(H.DLVRY_POST) WHEN '' THEN '' ELSE SUBSTR(H.DLVRY_POST, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(H.DLVRY_POST, 4, 3) END AS DLVRY_POST , H.DLVRY_ADDR , H.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL , H.DLVRY_MEMO , A.CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG , A.CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG , A.CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG , A.CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG , A.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG , A.CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG , CASE(A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE) WHEN 'M' THEN '휴대폰인증' WHEN 'C' THEN '신용카드인증' WHEN 'X' THEN '범용인증서인증' WHEN 'FN' THEN 'FAX인증(관리자인증 대기중)' WHEN 'FY' THEN 'FAX인증(관리자인증 완료)' ELSE '' END AS ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , A.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO , A.RES_CODE , A.RES_MSG , A.RES_NO , CASE(A.PSTATE) WHEN '00' THEN '정상처리' WHEN '10' THEN '고객취소' WHEN '20' THEN '관리자삭제' ELSE '' END AS PSTATE , CASE(A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE) WHEN '00' THEN '접수' WHEN '01' THEN '접수완료' WHEN '10' THEN '배송대기' WHEN '11' THEN '배송중' WHEN '12' THEN '배송완료' WHEN '20' THEN '개통대기' WHEN '21' THEN '개통완료' ELSE '' END AS REQUEST_STATE_CODE , A.OPEN_NO , A.RIP , TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD : HH24:MI') RDATE , A.AGENT_CODE , A.MANAGER_CODE , A.FILE01 , A.FILE01_MASK , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID , (SELECT TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD : HH24:MI') FROM MSP_REQUEST_STATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY AND REQUEST_STATE_CODE = '21') AS OPEN_RDATE FROM MSP_REQUEST A , MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR B , MSP_REQUEST_AGENT C , MSP_REQUEST_MOVE D , MSP_REQUEST_PAYMENT E , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO F , MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE G --, MSP_REQUSET_DLVRY H , MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY H , MSP_REQUEST_REQ I WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND C.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND D.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY AND E.REQUEST_KEY = F.REQUEST_KEY AND F.REQUEST_KEY = G.REQUEST_KEY AND G.REQUEST_KEY = H.REQUEST_KEY AND H.REQUEST_KEY = I.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY < 10000
ORDER BY A.REQUEST_KEY DESC
